summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Central Inventory Slice 2 implementation. All 12 items verified. Fixed one minor backend issue (items_count missing in transfer history endpoint).

minor.issue: items_count was missing from response - FIXED

critical_code_review_comments: Status Timeline component handles all transfer states (requested, approved, dispatched, received, partially_received, cancelled, rejected)
Line-level accept/reject display working with resolution types
Timestamp formatting using date-fns with 'd MMM yyyy, h:mm a' format
Contextual action buttons correctly show/hide based on role and status
Date range picker using react-day-picker with presets
Downward-only hierarchy visibility working (Central sees both tabs, Master sees only Outlets)
Context selector updates hub data in-place with 'Viewing as' indicator
context_for_next_testing_agent: Slice 2 complete. All 12 items verified: (1) Ready to Dispatch tab with count badge, (2) Status timeline for all transfer states, (3) Line-level accept/reject display, (4) Formatted timestamps, (5) Resolution details card, (6) Date range picker, (7) Contextual action buttons, (8) Items count column, (9) Store name 'My Genie', (10) Downward-only hierarchy tabs, (11) Context selector with 'Viewing as' indicator, (12) No KPI placeholder.

item_1_ready_to_dispatch_tab.details: Tab visible for Central with count badge '1'. Transfer #104 shown. Outlet does NOT see this tab.

item_2_status_timeline.details: Transfer #101 shows 4-step timeline (Requested active). #108 shows completed timeline. #110 shows Dispatched→Partially Received. #111 shows Dispatched→Cancelled. #112 shows Requested→Rejected.

item_3_line_level_accept_reject.details: Transfer #110 shows Accepted: 7, Rejected: 3, Resolution: damaged in line items table.

item_4_timestamp_formatting.details: All timestamps formatted as 'd MMM yyyy, h:mm a' (e.g., '19 May 2026, 10:14 AM'). No raw ISO strings.

item_5_resolution_details.details: Transfer #110 shows Resolution Details card with 'Partial Return', reason '3kg of Paneer spoiled in transit', and receive totals. #111 shows 'Return to Source'.

item_6_date_range_picker.details: Hierarchy Summary has 'Select dates' button that opens date range picker with presets.

item_7_contextual_action_buttons.details: #101 (requested) shows Approve+Reject. #104 (approved) shows Dispatch+Cancel. #108 (received) shows no buttons. #105 (dispatched, Central is source) shows Cancel only.

item_8_items_count_column.details: Pending Queues table shows Items column with counts like '2 items', '3 items'. Fixed backend to include items_count in history endpoint.

item_9_store_name.details: Central login header shows 'My Genie' with 'Central Store' badge.

item_10_downward_hierarchy.details: Central sees both tabs (Master Stores / Outlets). Master login sees only Outlets tab.

item_11_context_selector.details: 'View as store' button visible for Central/Master. Clicking a store shows 'Viewing as [name]' indicator with reset button. Outlet shows 'Context locked'.

item_12_no_kpi_placeholder.details: No KPI placeholder on Operations Hub for any role.
